mediaconnect.flowoutput.encryption.Algor.Description: The type of algorithm that is used for the encryption (such as aes128, aes192, or aes256).

mediaconnect.flowoutput.encryption.KeyTy.Description: The type of key that is used for the encryption. If you don't specify a `keyType` value, the service uses the default setting (`static-key`).

mediaconnect.flowoutput.encryption.RoleA.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role that you created during setup (when you set up MediaConnect as a trusted entity).

mediaconnect.flowoutput.encryption.Secre.Description: The ARN of the secret that you created in AWS Secrets Manager to store the encryption key.
